caption: The video shows a person holding a handmade birthday card with both hands. The card features a dark green background adorned with a pattern of yellow and white speckles, giving it a festive and textured appearance. In the center of the card, there is a circular label with the text "Wishing your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things." The person's hands gently adjust the card, ensuring it is properly displayed. The setting appears to be a crafting table, as various crafting tools and materials, such as scissors, tape, and other cards, are visible in the background. The overall scene suggests that the person is showcasing their completed card-making project.
